Build better widgets, faster

Widget Co helps teams design, ship, and monitor widgets at scale. Trusted by hundreds of companies around the world to power their most important dashboards.

Why Widget Co

Our platform combines a visual editor with a powerful API, so your team can move from idea to production widget in minutes instead of days.

What our customers say
